nasb.text: “They shall also make the ephod of gold, of blue and purple and scarlet material and fine twisted linen, the work of the skillful workman.

esv.text: “And they shall make the ephod of gold, of blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and of fine twined linen, skillfully worked.

cnv.text: “他們要拿金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻，用巧工來做以弗得。

ccb.text: “以弗得要用金线和细麻线及蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线精工制作。
